text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I guess we're stopping for now, huh?
choice_data_list: I think I've embarrassed myself enough...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
N-no, you were fine! The controls are pretty
difficult on this model!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Since the difficulty seems a bit overtuned, I'll let
someone at the company know the next time I
have a chance.
